channel.title: list on Analyst
channel.description: Recent content in list on Analyst

item.title: Hands-on Experience
item.description: All the challenges I’ve completed and solved 🛠️ - in process, ✔️ - done. Forensics Autopsy 8-Hour Course + DFIR challenge ✔️ Practical Malware Analysis ​l​a​b​s​ ✔️ CrackMe (1 and 2 for interview) ✔️ MacOS problem 2 from here ✔️ Pentest Skillset labs ✔️ BeeWAPP ✔️ InsecureBankv2 ✔️ General Viginear Cipher (Coursera) ✔️

item.title: Library
item.description: All the books and articles that I’ve read and found interesting. 📖 reading now, ✔️ - read.

item.title: Theory Acquisition
item.description: *All the courses I’ve completed 👀 - in process, ✔️ - done, watched and now being digested into articles on the website - 🍔 *
